title: More Stuff Modpack
description: This modpack gives, in my opinion, the ideal way to play my mod, More Stuff.
body:
# What is this?
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This is, in my opinion, the best way to play my mod, More stuff!
Please enjoy it and have fun with my mod!

# what if i need help with the mod?
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
check out the discord to get help or suggest ideas for the mod. remember, it can be anything minecraft has as this mod adds more stuff, not more of a specific item.

# what does this modpack feature?
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
It features one of my first mods ever on minecraft, and a few other mods like essential for multiplayer, and even a rescource pack for a custom title screen logo!

silly creeper:
![silly little guy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48d31914ae15552280ed96a788f7e65ce1688f9b.png)
